title: 城市创新群体活动模式研究
titleEn: Activity Patterns of Urban Innovative Groups
summary: 基于3.1万+ GPS记录，分析创新与非创新群体的多日活动-出行模式；使用聚类和GIS空间分析方法。
summaryEn: Analyzed multi-day activity-travel patterns of innovative vs. non-innovative groups using 31,000+ GPS records; employed clustering and GIS spatial analysis methods.

title: 亚热带城市道路环境对骑行路线选择的影响
titleEn: Impact of Subtropical Urban Road Environments on Cycling Route Choice
summary: 研究深圳环境与基础设施因素如何影响骑行者非通勤路线选择；构建OLS模型量化自然与建成环境的影响。
summaryEn: Examined how environmental and infrastructural factors shape cyclists' non-commuting route choices in Shenzhen; built OLS models to quantify natural and built environment effects.

title: 货运与物流调查：车辆与货运追踪数据收集方法
titleEn: Future Freight and Logistics Survey: Vehicle-and-Shipment-Tracking Data Collection
summary: 收集托运人、承运人、司机等多方数据；开发调查平台并开展试点研究验证可行性。
summaryEn: Collected data from shippers, carriers, and drivers; developed a survey platform and conducted pilot study to verify feasibility.

title: 个人主页
summary: 基于 Vue 3 + Tailwind CSS 构建的双语个人主页，展示简历、项目作品与摄影。自动部署于 GitHub Pages。
summaryEn: Bilingual personal website built with Vue 3 + Tailwind CSS. Showcases resume, projects, and photography. Auto-deployed on GitHub Pages.
